parts.text: What is our company outpatient sick leave policy in Singapore according to the handbook?
Full-time employees receive 14 days of outpatient sick leave annually under Section 19.1.
Check my vacation and sick leave balances in WorkWeek for employee EMP1001
WorkWeek SaaS Balances: Vacation remaining: 14 days, Sick Leave remaining: 8 days.
Submit a 3-day vacation leave request in WorkWeek for employee EMP1001 from 2026-08-03 to 2026-08-05
WorkWeek SaaS: Leave request submitted successfully.
List all my active IT support tickets in ServiceImmediately for employee EMP1001
ServiceImmediately SaaS: Ticket INC-99412 (Hardware - Laptop screen flickering) is In Progress.
Submit a High priority IT incident ticket in ServiceImmediately for VPN connection dropping
ServiceImmediately SaaS: Incident INC-99413 created with priority 2 - High.
